WHAT: Restaurant
APPETIZER: Fries
DRINK: Coffee
MAIN-DISH: Sushi
DESSERT: Fudge
SALAD: Rocket

The waiter does not know about it yet.

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.

You are a customer in a restaurant. Here is a description of what you'd like to order:

WHAT: Restaurant
APPETIZER: Fries
DRINK: Coffee
MAIN-DISH: Sushi
DESSERT: Fudge
SALAD: Rocket

The waiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the waiter will start with WAITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I'll have the sushi, please.

WHAT: Restaurant
APPETIZER: Fries
DRINK: Coffee
MAIN-DISH: Sushi
DESSERT: Fudge
SALAD: Rocket

The waiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the waiter will start with WAITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer in a restaurant. Here is a description of what you'd like to order:

WHAT: Restaurant
APPETIZER: Fries
DRINK: Coffee
MAIN-DISH: Sushi
DESSERT: Fudge
SALAD: Rocket

The waiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the waiter will start with WAITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer in a restaurant. Here is a description of what you'd like to order:

WHAT: Restaurant
APPETIZER: Fries
DRINK: Coffee
MAIN-DISH: Sushi
DESSERT: Fudge
SALAD: Rocket

The waiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the waiter will start with WAITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: WAITER: May I bring you anything to drink?
ANSWER: I'll have a coffee, please.
WAITER: Would you like any salads?
ANSWER: Yes, I'll have the rocket salad, please.
WAITER: Shall I bring you any appetizers?
ANSWER: Yes, I'll have the fries, please.
WAITER: Anything sweet after the meal?
ANSWER: Yes, I'll have the fudge, please.
WAITER: What is your choice for the main dish?
ANSWER: I'll have the sushi, please.
ME:  Is the waiter aware of your preference for salad? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
